overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a rainy night in a historic city resembling New Orleans. The character navigates from a narrow alley with hanging laundry into wider cobblestone streets illuminated by gas lamps, eventually encountering a horse rider.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with hanging laundry lines

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow muddy alley between wooden shacks, passing beneath hanging laundry lines

entered.detail: weathered wooden wall of a shack, close to the camera on the left side
weathered wooden wall of a shack, close to the camera on the right side
lit oil lantern sitting on a wooden table, casting warm orange light
clotheslines with hanging fabric strung across the alley overhead
wooden crate or box sitting against the left wall
open doorway leading out to the street visible at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a tight, muddy alleyway between weathered wooden buildings. Clotheslines with hanging laundry stretch overhead, illuminated by warm oil lanterns. The space is enclosed and sheltered from the rain, creating an intimate, dimly lit atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street with gas lamps

events.description: exits narrow alley onto open cobblestone street with gas lighting

agents.ego_description: steps out of the alley and begins walking along the wet cobblestone street, turning left to follow the road

entered.detail: tall cast-iron gas lamp post with warm glowing light
two-story building with wrought-iron balcony and shuttered windows
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street
wooden wagon or cart parked on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens onto a rain-slicked cobblestone street lined with historic buildings featuring wrought-iron balconies. Gas lamps cast warm golden light onto the wet ground, and tram tracks run down the center of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with tram tracks and storefronts

events.description: character turns slightly to follow the curving street layout

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street, observing the surrounding buildings and street furniture

entered.detail: historic two-story building with wooden shutters and balcony
wooden plank fence lining the right side of the street
ground-floor storefront with large windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the main street, passing various historic storefronts and buildings with shuttered windows. The rain creates reflective pools on the cobblestones, and tram tracks guide the path forward through the atmospheric urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with passing horse rider and painted building signage

events.description: horse with rider passes by on the left side of the street moving in same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street as a horse rider passes by in the same direction

notable_agents.action: horse with rider trotting past the character on the left side of the street

entered.detail: building with large painted 'Schiffer' signage on the wall, featuring a covered sidewalk

segments.scene_description: A horse and rider pass by on the left, moving in the same direction down the wet street. The character passes a building with a prominent 'Schiffer' painted sign on the right, continuing through the rain-soaked historic district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, sheltered alleyway into the expansive, rain-drenched streets of a historic city. It begins by navigating a tight, muddy passage between weathered wooden buildings, where hanging laundry stretches overhead under the dim glow of oil lanterns. As the character moves forward, the enclosed space gives way to a wide, rain-slicked cobblestone street lined with ornate wrought-iron balconies. The scene then opens further as the lighting shifts to the warm golden radiance of gas lamps reflecting off the wet ground and tram tracks.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked historic district as the character navigates a dimly lit urban corridor. It begins by tracking along a main street, passing a series of shuttered storefronts and historic buildings while the camera follows the line of tram tracks embedded in the cobblestones. As the character moves forward, the environment becomes more dynamic with the appearance of reflective pools of water mirroring the city lights. The scene then shifts as a horse and rider glide past on the left, moving in tandem with the character through the downpour. Finally, the camera passes a building marked by a prominent Schiffer sign on the right before continuing deeper into the rain-soaked district.
